hii team,
this is yaswanth,
todays updates are 
- Height ignore limit changed — from 70% → 50% → 90% → 99% in rules.py.
- YOLO resolution increased — from imgsz=320 to imgsz=640 in detector.py
 for better far-away detection.
- SQLite fix — USE_SQLITE=True is now properly passed inside the Docker backend container via 
docker-compose.yml.
- SQLite file persisted — database file saved to ./data/restaurant_ai.db mounted as a volume so data is never lost on restart.
- here what we done is the chnaged   Config.py updated — SQLITE_PATH setting added so backend reads the correct database file path inside the container.
- MySQL errors fixed — backend was silently connecting to remote MySQL instead of SQLite, causing connection timeouts and crashes.
- Diagnosed green polygon bug — Inside Zone polygon was blocking all counting because feet were never inside the drawn area.
- Diagnosed Entry Line position — blue line was drawn too high (Y=0.791), feet always below it so crossing never triggered.
- Containers rebuilt — both backend and ai_engine containers rebuilt and restarted to apply all changes.
